channel.title: Implement `ignore` in Html2React
channel.description:
**--- [Roadmap Card](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Implement-ignore-in-Html2React-48f6b5a11ee84b8faffe39f3a0c61d7b)**
<!-- Please, follow this template in order to be as efficient as possible. Before opening a new feature, please check that it hasn't been already added. -->
## Description It looks like `node.ignore` was included in the [types of html2react](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/blob/dev/packages/html2react/types.ts#L31) but it's not implemented yet.
## User Stories
> As a **Frontity theme developer** > I want to **mark a processor with `ignore`** > so that **it doesn't get processed by other processors**

item.title: Implement `ignore` in Html2React
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
— Roadmap Card

Description

It looks like node.ignore was included in the types of html2react but it’s not implemented yet.

User Stories

As a Frontity theme developer
I want to mark a processor with ignore
so that it doesn’t get processed by other processors

Read full topic
